title: Monday to Xero File attach
excerpt:
Hey, 
I have been using Zapier to integrate Monday to Xero, for example when a new bill is entered it will create an item in a board on Monday. Has anyone got any advice on setting up a Zapier to attach the file from Xer…

posts.author: Keiren (Keiren)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
I have been using Zapier to integrate Monday to Xero, for example when a new bill is entered it will create an item in a board on Monday. Has anyone got any advice on setting up a Zapier to attach the file from Xero to the item on Monday, everything I have tried does not allow the file to be attached

posts.author: amesure (Ana Mesure)
posts.cookedHtml: I need this too. Have you found a solution?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @amesure - make.com integrates far better with monday than Zapier. We tend to direct folks in that direction. We have built out numerous complex Xero/Monday scenarios in make.com - if you need a hand in the future let us know.

Thanks!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.
